items.title: Introducing Advanced Account Security
items.raw_content: Introducing Advanced Account Security: phishing-resistant login, stronger recovery, and enhanced protections to safeguard sensitive data and prevent account takeover.
items.ai_summary: OpenAI推出高级账户安全功能，包括防钓鱼登录和增强恢复。

items.title: Building the compute infrastructure for the Intelligence Age
items.raw_content: OpenAI scales Stargate to build the compute infrastructure powering AGI, adding new data center capacity to meet growing AI demand.
items.ai_summary: OpenAI扩展Stargate计算基础设施以支持AGI发展。

items.title: Where the goblins came from
items.raw_content: How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.
items.ai_summary: OpenAI解释GPT-5中“goblin”输出现象的原因和修复。

items.title: Cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age
items.raw_content: OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems.
items.ai_summary: OpenAI提出五部分网络安全行动计划，强调AI驱动防御。

items.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
items.raw_content: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
items.ai_summary: OpenAI模型、Codex和托管代理现已可在AWS上使用。

items.title: Our commitment to community safety
items.raw_content: Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.
items.ai_summary: OpenAI通过模型防护、滥用检测等保障ChatGPT社区安全。

items.title: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
items.raw_content: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.
items.ai_summary: OpenAI和微软宣布修订合作协议，简化合作结构，提供长期清晰度，并支持持续的大规模AI创新。

items.title: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
items.raw_content: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.
items.ai_summary: OpenAI获得FedRAMP Moderate授权，可供美国联邦机构使用。

items.title: An open-source spec for orchestration: Symphony
items.raw_content: Learn how Symphony, an open-source spec for Codex orchestration, turns issue trackers into always-on agent systems—boosting engineering output and reducing context switching.
items.ai_summary: Symphony是一个开源规范，用于Codex编排，将问题跟踪器转化为常驻代理系统，提高工程产出并减少上下文切换。

items.title: Choco automates food distribution with AI agents
items.raw_content: How Choco used OpenAI APIs to streamline food distribution, boost productivity, and unlock growth—an in-depth customer story on real-world AI impact.
items.ai_summary: Choco使用OpenAI API优化食品分销流程，提升生产力和增长，展示了AI的实际影响。
